title: GitHub CLI
content:
### gh CLI Tool

The [GitHub CLI](https://cli.github.com) (`gh`) brings GitHub actions to your terminal. Install via package manager or direct download.

### Authentication

```bash
gh auth login
# Follow the prompts to authenticate via browser or token
```

### Common Commands

```bash
# Create a new repository
gh repo create my-repo --public --clone

# Create a pull request
gh pr create --title "My PR" --body "Description" --base main

# List issues
git issue list --label bug

# Run a workflow
git workflow run build.yml --ref main

# View PR status
gh pr status
```

### Working with Multiple Hosts

`gh` supports multiple GitHub hosts (e.g., GHES). Use `--hostname` flag or set different profiles.

### Aliases

```bash
gh alias set bugs 'issue list --label="bug"'
gh bugs  # Equivalent to the above
```
codeExample:
gh repo create my-repo --public --clone
gh pr create --title "New feature" --body "Adds feature X"
gh issue list --label bug
gh workflow run build.yml
